ats_utilities.console_io.ireporter module¶

Module

ireporter.py

Info

Defines abstract class IATSReporter with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for reporting message.

class ats_utilities.console_io.ireporter.IATSReporter[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IATSReporter with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for reporting message.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Marks error types.
methods:
error - Report error message (abstract).
success - Report success message (abstract).
verbose - Report verbose message (abstract).
warning - Report warning message (abstract).
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract error(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report error message.

Parameters:

message (<List[Any]>) – List with message

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract success(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report success message.

Parameters:

message (<List[Any]>) – List with message

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract verbose(is_verbose: bool, message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report verbose message.

Parameters:

  • is_verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

  • message (<List[Any]>) – List with message

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract warning(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Report warning message.

Parameters:

message (<List[Any]>) – List with message

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
